subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ1.8
question_html:
Which electrons are removed from iron (Z = 26) to form iron(II)?

A. two 3d electrons

B. two 4s electrons

C. one 4s electron and one 3d electron

D. two 4p electrons
examiners_html: Stating the 4s electrons are lost first in forming the Fe(II) ion was done correctly by 58 % but with a low discrimination index.
